name: Jello-Filled Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut oranges in half and remove the pulp, reserving the juice.
2. Place the empty orange shells into custard cups or muffin tins.
3. Mix dissolved gelatine with cold water according to package instructions.
4. Stir together boiling water, sugar, and Kool-Aid until well combined.
5. Pour the prepared mixture into the shells, filling them completely.
6. Chill until set.
7. Once chilled, cut oranges into eighths.
